top_signals.title: Emerging Market Assets Rally on China Tech Support, Iran Talks
top_signals.summary: Emerging market stocks rebounded after three days of losses after China mounted a state-sponsored rescue program for its tech shares.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SBI Funds Rises 6.2% in Trading Debut After $1 Billion India IPO
top_signals.summary: SBI Funds Management Ltd. shares rose 6.2% in their Mumbai debut Tuesday after investors piled into the company’s $1 billion initial public offering, making it one of India’s most heavily subscribed billion-dollar share sales.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
